title: Required Blood Product Unavailable Before Transfusion
scenario: A transfusion reaches execution but the required blood product is unavailable.
initial_state: The transfusion was authorized assuming blood availability.
state_transition: The required blood product becomes unavailable before execution.
execution_boundary: Transfusion is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required resource availability.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required blood product is unavailable.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required blood resources are unavailable.
